sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74549" key="o(plitodrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁπλῑτο-δρομέω</orth>, <sense id="n74549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run a race in armour,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:23:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
